# Chrome extension not present in Ubuntu (#1301)

[Chrome extension not present in Ubuntu](https://github.com/subhra74/xdm/issues/1301#top)

[Yugsolanki](https://github.com/Yugsolanki)
[on Oct 21, 2025](https://github.com/subhra74/xdm/issues/1301#issue-3537710984)
Describe the bug The chrome extension is missing from /opt/xdman folder in linux (Ubuntu). I have downloaded version 7.2.11 form the official website.
https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/65902617/503822166-c986d603-1ffe-4069-938d-6413e7df6657.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..MfbRsDjoce2Jv1bt-0Xd-X2DS6mffwp6coHNm_cnKpIScreenshots
please complete the following information:
- OS: [e.g. Linux (Ubuntu 24.04)]
- Browser [e.g. chrome]
- XDM addon Version [e.g. 2.0]
- XDM Version [e.g. 7.2.11]
